summary: The diff implements both REQ-1 (backend displayOrder field and reorderCharacters endpoint) and REQ-2 (drag-and-drop in AdminCharactersPanel). All major acceptance criteria appear to be addressed. Minor gaps exist around admin-only enforcement of drag-and-drop in the UI and explicit sorting in getCharacters on the backend (the backend is truncated so sorting behavior cannot be fully confirmed).

missing_requirements.requirement: Drag-and-drop is disabled for non-admin users.
missing_requirements.reason: The AdminCharactersPanel diff shows drag handlers attached unconditionally without any check against admin status. There is no visible guard (e.g., checking useIsCallerAdmin) to disable the drag handle or drag events for non-admin users.

missing_requirements.requirement: Characters returned by the existing getCharacters query are sorted by displayOrder ascending.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo diff is truncated and does not show the getCharacters implementation. It is unclear whether getCharacters has been updated to sort by displayOrder ascending. The frontend compensates with a client-side sort, but backend-level sorting is required per the AC.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added to handle schema migration for the new displayOrder field.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention any migration module or migration strategy. While the displayOrder field addition is required, the explicit migration.mo file and its integration via the migration hook in main.mo were not requested.
